itinerary.title: Arrival in Singapore and Marina Bay Sands
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Singapore Changi Airport, transfer to your hotel and complete check-in. In the evening, visit Marina Bay Sands and watch the spectacular Spectra Light and Water Show, followed by dinner at a local restaurant.

itinerary.title: City Sightseeing Tour and Gardens by the Bay
itinerary.description: Enjoy a morning sightseeing tour visiting Merlion Park, the Esplanade, Chinatown, and Little India. In the afternoon, visit Gardens by the Bay to explore the Flower Dome and Cloud Forest. Spend your free evening exploring the restaurants and nightlife of Clarke Quay.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island and Universal Studios Pass
itinerary.description: Spend a full day on Sentosa Island. You can choose to visit the famous Universal Studios theme park, walk through the S.E.A. Aquarium, or play at the Adventure Cove Waterpark. Enjoy dinner next to the beach on Sentosa.

itinerary.title: Singapore Zoo, River Wonders, and Night Safari
itinerary.description: Visit the Singapore Zoo and the neighboring River Wonders park. In the evening, enjoy the famous Night Safari tram tour to see nocturnal animals in their forest habitats before returning to your hotel.

itinerary.title: Orchard Road Shopping and Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast at your hotel and check out. Spend your morning shopping on the famous Orchard Road before taking a private transfer to Changi Airport for your departure flight.

title: Singapore Highlights
description: Experience the futuristic skyline, theme parks, and rich heritage of Singapore on this 5-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of city exploration, shopping, and family-friendly attractions.
highlights: Watch the Spectra Light and Water Show at Marina Bay Sands
Guided tour of Chinatown, Little India, and Gardens by the Bay
Pass to Sentosa Island and Universal Studios theme park
Tram ride at the famous Singapore Zoo Night Safari
